blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
